content.text:
Now I have a clear view of the molecule with atom indices labeled. Looking at atom N:14 (blue sphere), I can clearly see its covalent bonds to:

1. C:15 (carbon, yellow/orange sphere) - directly bonded
2. C:33 (carbon, yellow/orange sphere) - directly bonded  
3. H:50 (hydrogen, white sphere) - directly bonded

The image shows these three atoms connected to N:14 with visible bonds. There are no other atoms directly bonded to N:14 in this visualization.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file naming convention in the working directory, I can see "geomconf_4409.xyz", which suggests the geomconf_index is 4409.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom N:14 are:
- Atom index 15, element C (carbon)
- Atom index 33, element C (carbon)  
- Atom index 50, element H (hydrogen)

Geomconf_index: 4409

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 14, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
